description: Vertical promotional graphic. The full-bleed background is a soft-focus photograph set in an airport terminal: two people embrace. The person facing the camera is a woman wearing eyeglasses and a denim jacket, hugging a man in a white shirt; a handbag hangs from a shoulder and the top of rolling luggage is visible in the foreground. Overlaid white text reads: 'If you self-deport now, you MAY be able to return as an immigrant or visitor someday -' followed by a large headline with the last words in green: 'the LEGAL way'. A solid dark-blue band across the bottom holds the DHS seal, the white 'ICE' wordmark, and 'Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation'.
notable_text: If you self-deport now, you MAY be able to return as an immigrant or visitor someday - the LEGAL way; Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation
